posts.text: Three new reactors @INL add to a #nuclear legacy that now includes a total of 55 reactors, spanning more than 75 years.⚛️ From historic firsts to the latest generation of advanced reactors, our page highlights them all: https://inl.gov/history/reactors/ #NuclearEnergy #NuclearRenaissance
posts.author: quakes99

posts.text: OpenAI and Google provided advanced AI services to Singapore-based affiliates of Alibaba, Baidu and Tencent, according to a Financial Times report. The Chinese parent companies are included on the Pentagon's 1260H list, but the AI access reportedly remained legal under current US rules because the services were used outside mainland China. OpenAI said it blocks direct access from China but allows some Chinese-owned companies to use its models in other markets where safeguards are in place. The company later suspended API access for users linked to Alibaba after detecting possible model "distillation," a method that can use outputs from advanced AI systems to improve rival models. OpenAI said it also informed the US government. Google said its AI products remain available in markets such as Singapore and Hong Kong under existing policies. The report has added to calls in Washington for tighter restrictions on access to advanced AI technology.
posts.author: WatcherGuru
